reasoning: The control SI-4 (19) focuses on system monitoring and risk for individuals, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and network monitoring capabilities. Kubernetes audit logging ensures that all API interactions are logged, which is akin to cloud services like AWS CloudTrail. Ensuring the integrity of these logs is crucial, hence the log integrity verification. Admission controllers can enforce security policies that help in monitoring and mitigating risks at the admission stage. NetworkPolicies can be used to monitor and control network traffic, similar to cloud threat detection services.
title: System Monitoring | Risk for Individuals
